narrative:
St Marys Township has 7,309 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.6 percentage points.
